title.en: CONTAINERS SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR MEDICAL OR PHARMACEUTICAL PURPOSES; DEVICES OR METHODS SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR BRINGING PHARMACEUTICAL PRODUCTS INTO PARTICULAR PHYSICAL OR ADMINISTERING FORMS; DEVICES FOR ADMINISTERING FOOD OR MEDICINES ORALLY; BABY COMFORTERS; DEVICES FOR RECEIVING SPITTLE

Containers specially adapted for medical or pharmaceutical purposes (capsules or the like for oral use A61J3/07; specially adapted for surgical or diagnostic appliances or instruments A61B50/30; containers for radioactive substances G21F5/00)
for pills or tablets (containers for pills or tablets with special dispensing means therefor B65D83/04)
for collecting, storing or administering blood, plasma or medical fluids {(multiple bags systems for separating or storing blood components A61M1/0209); Infusion or perfusion containers}
Details; Accessories therefor (A61J7/00 takes precedence; openers B65D, B67B7/00)
Devices or methods specially adapted for bringing pharmaceutical products into particular physical or administering forms
{Compounding apparatus specially for enteral or parenteral nutritive solutions (bottling liquids B67C)}
{Coating of tablets or the like (coating of sweetmeats or confectionery A23G3/20; coating of granules in general B01J2/006)}
{Marking tablets or the like (apparatus for printing on tablets or the like B41F17/36)}
into the form of powders (pulverising in general B02C)
into the form of ointments
into the form of pills, lozenges or dragees
into the form of capsules or similar small containers for oral use
into the form of suppositories or sticks
into the form of compressed tablets (tablet presses B30B11/00)

Devices for administering medicines orally, e.g. spoons (calibrated capacity measures for fluids or fluent solid material G01F19/00; weighing spoons G01G19/56); Pill counting devices; Arrangements for time indication or reminder for taking medicine
{Pill breaking or crushing devices}
{Devices specially adapted for taking medicines}
{Trays for holding or distributing medicines (display trays A47F3/14; serving trays A47G23/06)}
{Medicament distribution means (with pill counting devices A61J7/02; with time indication A61J7/04; containers or packages with special means for dispensing contents B65D83/00)}
{for holding medicines in, or fixing medicines on, a tooth, e.g. holder containing medicines fixed on a tooth (medicament applicators for teeth or gums A61C19/063)}
Pill counting devices
Arrangements for time indication or reminder for taking medicine, e.g. programmed dispensers
Feeding-bottles in general
{with inner liners}
{Vacuum feeding-bottles (vacuum bottles in general A47J41/02)}
{Non-rigid or collapsible feeding-bottles}
{having elongated tubes, e.g. for drinking from bottle in upright position}
{having storage compartments, e.g. for storing a teat}
with thermometers
with means for supplying air
Holders for bottles
Protective covers for bottles
Teats
{having additional ports, e.g. for connecting syringes or straws (devices for administering medicines orally A61J7/00)}
{having means for regulating the flow rate}
{having filters}
{having means for incorporating a mother's scent}
{having particular shape or structure}
{having orthodontic properties, e.g. for promoting correct teeth development}
{Accessories therefor}
with means for supplying air
with means for fastening to bottles
Breast-nipple shields (breast-pumps A61M1/06)
Feeding-tubes for therapeutic purposes
{Nasal or oral feeding-tubes, e.g. tube entering body through nose or mouth}

{Feeding-tubes for delivery of nourishment to the mouth; Mouth pieces therefor (breast-nipple shields A61J13/00; mouth pieces for drinking straws A47G21/185; straws to take medicine A61J7/0038, mouthpieces for tracheal tubes A61M16/0488)}
{Gastrostomy feeding-tubes (insertion tools or methods A61B17/34)}
{Parts, details or accessories for feeding-tubes (external tubes from medical containers to a connector outside of the body A61M39/08)}

biodegradable

Colour codes

by shape or form, e.g. by using shape recognition
